title: asclepias gibba
intro: Asclepias gibba, also known as the dwarf milkweed, is a perennial plant native to the Americas, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Asclepias gibba include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used topically to treat various skin conditions and wounds.
